title: ekklino #1578
definition:
1) to turn aside, deviate (from the right way and course)
 2) to turn (one's self) away, to turn away from, keep aloof from
    one's society
 3) to shun one
nasbUsage:

 2) to turn (one's self) away, to turn away from, keep aloof from
    one's society
 3) to shun one

    NASB:  to deviate, to turn away (from someone or something):
